assertions.assertion: Creates a ProfileDataRequestContext with a subject ClaimsPrincipal containing a sub claim
assertions.rationale: new ProfileDataRequestContext(subject: subject, ...) where subject has Claim(JwtClaimTypes.Subject, "user-123").

assertions.assertion: Mocks an IUserRepository (or equivalent) to return known role values
Calls GetProfileDataAsync and asserts that context.IssuedClaims contains the expected role claims
assertions.rationale: await _sut.GetProfileDataAsync(context), then Assert.Contains("admin", roles) and Assert.Contains("billing", roles).

assertions.assertion: Tests IsActiveAsync and asserts context.IsActive is set correctly based on the mock
assertions.rationale: Two tests: one with IsActiveAsync returning true (Assert.True), one returning false (Assert.False).

assertions.assertion: Does NOT require a running IdentityServer — tests the service in isolation
assertions.rationale: Tests construct contexts directly and invoke the service — no web host or IdentityServer needed.
